raw_response: {"response":"Do not accept. The candidate uses the approved primitives and has static plus desktop/mobile QA evidence, but it fails acceptance because required states are missing and core accessibility evidence is absent.","next_action":"Return for remediation and re-review after empty, disabled, and focus-visible states are covered and accessibility evidence is provided for semantic content, landmarks/headings, name/role/value, keyboard navigation, focus order, focus visibility, responsive no-overflow/reflow, and automated checks.","questions":[],"handoff":"Owner: implementer; action: add missing state coverage and core WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility evidence; reason: accessibility_evidence is empty for a dense custom-control operator screen.","rationale":"The implementation review failed. Required states are empty, ready, loading, error, disabled, and focus-visible, but only ready, loading, and error are covered. Automated checks alone are insufficient, and the candidate provides no evidence for the required accessibility areas that determine whether custom controls are operable, understandable, and reviewable."}

parsed.response: Do not accept. The candidate uses the approved primitives and has static plus desktop/mobile QA evidence, but it fails acceptance because required states are missing and core accessibility evidence is absent.
parsed.next_action: Return for remediation and re-review after empty, disabled, and focus-visible states are covered and accessibility evidence is provided for semantic content, landmarks/headings, name/role/value, keyboard navigation, focus order, focus visibility, responsive no-overflow/reflow, and automated checks.
parsed.handoff: Owner: implementer; action: add missing state coverage and core WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility evidence; reason: accessibility_evidence is empty for a dense custom-control operator screen.
parsed.rationale: The implementation review failed. Required states are empty, ready, loading, error, disabled, and focus-visible, but only ready, loading, and error are covered. Automated checks alone are insufficient, and the candidate provides no evidence for the required accessibility areas that determine whether custom controls are operable, understandable, and reviewable.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
